alias: Water leak detected — alert both phones
description: Fires immediately when either the dishwasher or furnace room water leak sensor detects water. Sends an urgent notification to both phones identifying which sensor triggered. Sends a clear notification when the sensor goes dry again.

data.title: 💧 WATER LEAK — Dishwasher
data.message: Water detected under the dishwasher. Check immediately!

data.title: 💧 WATER LEAK — Dishwasher
data.message: Water detected under the dishwasher. Check immediately!

data.title: 💧 WATER LEAK — Furnace Room
data.message: Water detected in the furnace room. Check immediately!

data.title: 💧 WATER LEAK — Furnace Room
data.message: Water detected in the furnace room. Check immediately!

data.title: ✅ Dishwasher leak sensor clear
data.message: No water detected under the dishwasher.

data.title: ✅ Dishwasher leak sensor clear
data.message: No water detected under the dishwasher.

data.title: ✅ Furnace room leak sensor clear
data.message: No water detected in the furnace room.

data.title: ✅ Furnace room leak sensor clear
data.message: No water detected in the furnace room.
